response.justification: Bogdan is a strong staff-level generalist with 15+ years of engineering experience, current MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure work at Google, and solid TypeScript, cloud, and mentoring credentials. However, his hands-on GenAI exposure appears limited to roughly the last year, falling well short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and the resume shows no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or Python — core requirements for this forward-deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at Google, directly matching the role's key technologies
Deep full-stack and systems breadth (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, low-latency services) for integrating with customer infrastructure
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Only about one year of GenAI-specific experience versus the required 8+ years of AI-driven solution development
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI
Python is absent from the skill set and resume, and customer-facing technical discovery leadership is only indirectly evidenced

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic infrastructure work at Google
